summary: Trabectedin (CMB305) has been clinically validated for treating specific types of soft tissue sarcomas such as liposarcoma and leiomyosarcoma, particularly when other therapies fail. It demonstrates significant anti-tumor effects in certain sarcoma subgroups like those driven by chromosomal rearrangements.
